mods.note: core progression backbone
tier-gating engine: items/recipes/blocks/entities/dimensions locked behind stages, FTB Teams+Quests integration for later phases
Tier 1 'dumb storage': link chests into a browsable terminal, patched to iron-tier via KubeJS (stock recipes need diamond+ender_pearl+glowstone)
Create Crafts & Additions - Alternator (kinetic->FE) and Electric Motor (FE->kinetic), unlocked at Brass Age to power Refined Storage

browsable storage network, explicitly named in instructions.md; moved to Brass Age unlock (needs Nether Quartz + diamond-tier processor, both available there), energy requirement kept on and powered by Create's own Alternator
JS engine required by KubeJS
recipe/loot scripting used for the storage tier patches here, and for the full recipe-gating pass in Phase 9
Pufferfish's Skills - RPG skill tree framework, categories authored in pack/kubejs/data/puffish_skills/
Pufferfish's Attributes - mining/pickaxe/sprinting speed, sword/ranged damage, bow/crossbow projectile speed etc used by our skill categories
required by the FTB Library/Teams/Quests chain below
FTB mod-common utility library, required by FTB Teams and FTB Quests. Not on Modrinth (FTB suite is CurseForge-exclusive) - resolved via direct CDN, see resolve_mods.py docstring
hard dependency of FTB Quests (not optional), installed in Phase 4; team_mode flipped to 'ftb_teams' in Phase 6 once real parties are wanted - see that phase's DESIGN.md notes

Tier Progression preset-track chapter only, generated by scripts/gen_quests.py into pack/config/ftbquests/quests/ (old SNBT format, not JSON5). Long-running/daily chapters moved to KubeJS in Phase 6 - see gen_achievements.py/gen_dailies.py and DESIGN.md

Create: Numismatics - coin currency (Spur/Bevel/Sprocket/Cog/Crown/Sun, physical items) + Vendor blocks for sell-to-vendor. Tier-based sell pricing generated by scripts/gen_economy.py from pack/config/ProgressiveStages/*.toml's item lists

global board for player-run Numismatics shops - browse/compare listings and navigate to a seller's persistent Vendor block from anywhere; purchase itself still happens at that block (doesn't require the seller online), not an instant remote transaction

chunk claims. All 3 required deps (Architectury API, FTB Library, FTB Teams) already installed since Phase 4 - reuses the same team/party system as FTB Quests' preset-track sharing rather than a second, parallel party concept
required by Silent Gear below
blacksmithing: modular tool/weapon assembly (rod+head+binding at a workstation) replaces flat crafting-table recipes, per instructions.md
combat variety: new weapon types with distinct movesets/playstyles, stamina, and a skill system - all-in-one rather than a separate weapon-variety + separate skill mod
required by Ars Nouveau - not listed in Modrinth's own dependency metadata for our version, found only via the actual boot error (ModLoadingException naming it directly)
required by Ars Nouveau - same as geckolib, found via the actual boot error rather than Modrinth's dependency metadata
magic system: mage archetype via spell crafting, summoner archetype via summon rituals (Summon Guardians/Wilden) + combat familiars
required by Apotheosis chain below
required by Apotheosis chain below (its in-game guidebook, technically optional per the mod but required by the jar's own dependency metadata)
required by Apotheosis
required by Apotheosis
required by Apotheosis

mob scaling: Apothic Invaders (visual light-beam+sound spawn indicator, scaled loot) and Apothic Elites cover the 'tell a stronger mob by looking at it' + 'rewards scale with difficulty' asks; affix/gem loot system covers unique boss-tier drops
required by YUNG's Better Dungeons below
overhauls vanilla's dungeon structure into larger multi-room dungeons - the 'some sort of dungeons' ask
structure variety/loot overhaul across most vanilla structures - world exploration emphasis + reward scaling for structures

Create: The Factory Must Grow - Create-native industrial addon, bridges to Stellaris below via its own compat mod. Pinned to 1.1.1 (not latest 1.2.0) because tfmg-stellaris-compat 1.1.1 requires tfmg in range [1.1.0, 1.2.0) and hasn't been updated for 1.2.0 yet - found via the actual boot error, not Modrinth's dependency metadata
required by Stellaris - not listed in Modrinth's own dependency metadata for our version, found only via the actual boot error (ModLoadingException naming it directly)
space travel: rocket crafting across planets/moons, the Starforged Age gateway per instructions.md's resolved space-travel decision (Ad Astra ruled out, stalled pre-1.21.1 NeoForge)
bridges Create: TFMG's industrial machines to Stellaris' rocket/planet progression - the reason Stellaris was chosen over other space mods
general startup/memory/loading-time optimization, both sides but especially server boot time
reduces heap memory usage - server performance is a major concern per instructions.md
concurrent chunk management (parallel gen/loading) - server-only, a heavily-modded worldgen stack is exactly where chunk loading is the biggest server bottleneck
network stack optimization (packet encoding/compression) - server-only, matters most under multiple simultaneous connections
worldgen performance (noise generation), complements c2me's parallelism rather than duplicating it
required by Allthemodium below (its own ore-gen companion mod)

gear overhaul (Phase 10): supplies Allthemodium/Vibranium/Unobtainium/Alloy as the Induction Age-and-beyond Silent Gear material tiers, per the user's explicit call to lean on a late-game meta-material mod rather than inventing bespoke space-tier materials. Its own native tools/armor/weapons are removed via KubeJS - only the raw materials are used, everything crafts through Silent Gear instead. Requires GeckoLib (already installed, Phase 7)
required by Building Wands below

utility overhaul: building wand/gadget for quick construction. Requires Architectury API (already installed, Phase 4) + Cloth Config above. Ships 5 hardcoded tiers (stone/copper/iron/diamond/netherite, a closed Java enum - no material registry to plug our own tiers into past netherite) plus a 3-tier Magic Bag block-source item, each gated behind the matching ProgressiveStages tier via KubeJS item locks
required by Sophisticated Backpacks below

utility overhaul: general expandable-inventory backpacks (6 hardcoded tiers, leather/copper/iron/gold/diamond/netherite - same closed-tier-ladder situation as Building Wands) plus the separate 'Miner's Pouch' progression line - Void/Filter/Stack Upgrade items socketed into any backpack for voidable bulk per-item storage, tier-gated independently of the backpack's own slot-count progression
required by Create Aeronautics below - confirmed via the jar's own neoforge.mods.toml (versionRange [2.0.0,3.0.0)), not just Modrinth's dependency metadata

travel overhaul (revised): planes/airships, replacing Immersive Aircraft per user request. The bundled jar jarjar-embeds Offroad and Simulated - re-inspected the actual 1.3.0 jar and found it now DOES ship real recipes (data/aeronautics/recipe/*), reversing the earlier phase's 'zero recipe files' finding which was true of an older release. Gating is entirely implicit via recipe-ingredient swaps (KubeJS, see travel.js) reusing materials this pack already tier-locks, rather than explicit ProgressiveStages item locks: Propeller Bearing already needs create:brass_casing (naturally Brass Age); Gyroscopic Propeller Bearing/Smart Propeller patched to need create:sturdy_sheet (Precision Age); Levitite Blend already needs crushed end_stone, naturally Precision-Age-gated since this pack locks the End itself until then; Steam Vent patched to need allthemodium:allthemodium_ingot (Induction Age, this pack's existing top material) as the ceiling before the Tier 5 space gateway; Adjustable Burner patched to need create:brass_sheet so basic burner-driven flight launches alongside the Bearing at Brass Age
required by Waystones below

travel overhaul: teleportation, explicitly gated late per the user's request. All recipes use only vanilla materials (ender pearl, amethyst shard, emerald, obsidian, stone bricks) with nothing naturally tier-locked in this pack, so gating is entirely explicit ProgressiveStages item locks at induction_age - the automation ceiling just before the Tier 5 space gateway
required by Terralith below - cross-mod biome region placement API
required by Terralith below - not listed in Modrinth's own dependency metadata for our version, found only via the actual boot error ('Mod terralith requires lithostitched 1.7.7 or above')

world exploration overhaul: ~100 new overworld biomes plus several new immersive structures, built entirely from vanilla blocks - no new items, so no economy/gen_economy.py work needed. Directly satisfies instructions.md's 'the world must be varied in content and biomes'
world exploration overhaul: new themed roguelike structures spread across many biomes (desert/ice/jungle/mushroom/sky/swamp/savanna dungeons etc.) - structure variety
world exploration overhaul: small atmospheric lore structures with their own loot - structure variety, low risk/no hard deps

world exploration overhaul: overhauls abandoned mineshafts into biome-themed variants (dirt/sandy/mesa/snowy/ice/jungle/ocean) with more elaborate layouts. Requires yungs-api (already installed, Phase 8)
world exploration overhaul: overhauls strongholds with more varied rooms and loot. Requires yungs-api
world exploration overhaul: overhauls desert pyramids with expanded interiors and loot. Requires yungs-api
world exploration overhaul: overhauls jungle temples with expanded interiors and loot. Requires yungs-api
world exploration overhaul: overhauls Nether fortresses into larger, more varied layouts. Requires yungs-api
world exploration overhaul: overhauls swamp huts with expanded interiors and loot. Requires yungs-api
world exploration overhaul: overhauls ocean monuments with more varied rooms and loot. Requires yungs-api
world exploration overhaul: overhauls the central End island approach/exit structures. Requires yungs-api
